Navigation.preferences_description: Update your language and theme settings.

Index.description: Notorium helps you manage subjects, notes, flashcards, assessments, and attendance all in one place. Stay on top of your academic life.

Landing.features_heading: Everything you need to stay on track
Landing.subjects_description: Organize your courses and modules in one place with descriptions and attendance tracking.
Landing.notes_description: Write and format notes with a rich text editor supporting headings, lists, code blocks, and more.
Landing.assessments_description: Track exams, assignments, and weighted grades to monitor your performance over time.
Landing.calendar_description: See assessments and attendance misses in a timeline view to plan your week better.
Landing.flashcards_description: Create flashcards and review them with spaced repetition to retain what you learn.
Landing.all_inclusive_description: No hidden fees, no premium tiers. Get full access to all Notorium features immediately.
Landing.opensource_notice_description: This instance is private and invite-only. However, Notorium is fully open-source! You can freely self-host your own instance.

SubjectsList.title: Subjects
SubjectsList.description: Manage your courses and track progress.
SubjectsList.limit_message: You've reached the system limit of {max} subjects. Please archive or delete subjects to create more.
SubjectsList.empty_description: Create your first subject to start organizing your notes and tracking your academic progress.

DeleteSubjectDialog.archive_prompt: Are you sure you want to archive
DeleteSubjectDialog.delete_prompt: Are you sure you want to delete
DeleteSubjectDialog.archive_suffix: ? You can restore it later from archived subjects.
DeleteSubjectDialog.delete_suffix: ? This action cannot be undone. All associated notes will also be deleted.

FlashcardsList.title: Flashcards
FlashcardsList.count_empty: Create cards to review key concepts quickly.
FlashcardsList.import_success: Imported {count, plural, one {# flashcard} other {# flashcards}} successfully.
FlashcardsList.import_read_error: Failed to import the selected file.
FlashcardsList.import_dialog_description: This will add flashcards from an Anki .txt export into the selected subject. Existing flashcards will not be changed.
FlashcardsList.empty_description: Create your first flashcard with a front and back.
FlashcardsList.limit_tooltip: You cannot create more flashcards for this subject
FlashcardsList.limit_message: You've reached the limit of {max} flashcards per subject. Please delete existing ones to create more.

FlashcardsPage.title: Flashcards
FlashcardsPage.description: Manage all your flashcards or switch to due-card review.

FlashcardsManager.limit_tooltip: You cannot create more flashcards for this subject
FlashcardsManager.limit_message: You've reached the limit of {max} flashcards per subject. Please delete existing ones to create more.
FlashcardsManager.empty_description: Pick a subject and create or import your first flashcards.

FlashcardReviewPage.title: Flashcard Review
FlashcardReviewPage.description: Review your due flashcards with spaced repetition.
FlashcardReviewPage.empty_description: There are no due flashcards to review.

NotesList.title: Notes
NotesList.count_empty: Capture what you learn, one note at a time.
NotesList.limit_tooltip: You cannot create more notes for this subject
NotesList.limit_message: You've reached the limit of {max} notes per subject. Please delete existing ones to create more.
NotesList.empty_description: Start by creating your first note.

AssessmentsOverview.title: Assessments
AssessmentsOverview.limit_tooltip: You cannot add more assessments to this subject
AssessmentsOverview.limit_message: You've reached the limit of {max} assessments per subject. Please delete existing ones to add more.
AssessmentsOverview.empty_description: Start by adding your first assessment.

ArchivedSubjectsPage.title: Archived Subjects
ArchivedSubjectsPage.count: {count, plural, one {# archived subject} other {# archived subjects}}
ArchivedSubjectsPage.empty_description: Archived subjects will show up here.

PlanningPage.title: Planning
PlanningPage.description: Switch between assessment management and your calendar timeline.

PlanningAssessmentsTable.empty_description: Assessments you add to your subjects will appear here.

CalendarView.title: Calendar
CalendarView.description: Assessments and attendance misses on a timeline.

GlobalSearch.dialog_description: Search across all your subjects, notes, and flashcards
GlobalSearch.empty_has_data: No subjects, notes, or flashcards yet.

ProfilePage.title: Manage Account
ProfilePage.description: Review your account information and manage your settings.

AdminPage.title: Admin Panel
AdminPage.description: Manage user access and approval states.

ProfileForm.profile_description: Inspect and update your account details and settings.
ProfileForm.ai_description: Bring your own OpenRouter key and model for flashcard generation. Your key is encrypted at rest and never shown again after saving.
ProfileForm.ai_saved_key: Saved key ending in {suffix}. Leave the field blank to keep it unchanged.
ProfileForm.ai_no_key: No API key saved yet. AI generation will stay unavailable until you add one.
ProfileForm.data_transfer_description: Export your study data as a JSON file, or import data from a previous Notorium export. API keys, account details, sessions, and other sensitive information are never included.
ProfileForm.danger_description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
ProfileForm.danger_body: Once you delete your account, all of your subjects, notes, assessments, and attendance records will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.

UserAccessManagement.title: Access Control
UserAccessManagement.description: Approve, hold, or block user access.
UserAccessManagement.name: Name
UserAccessManagement.no_results: No users match your current search or filter.

DataTransferActions.import_success: Imported {count, plural, one {# subject} other {# subjects}} successfully.
DataTransferActions.import_read_error: Failed to read the import file.
DataTransferActions.import_dialog_description: This will create new subjects from the import file with their study data only. Account details, API keys, sessions, and other sensitive information are ignored.

NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

AttendanceSettingsDialog.title: Attendance Settings
AttendanceSettingsDialog.description: Configure the total number of classes and maximum allowed misses for this subject.

AttendanceSummary.title: Attendance
AttendanceSummary.description_configured: Track your attendance status and recorded misses.
AttendanceSummary.description_unconfigured: Set attendance limits to begin tracking.
AttendanceSummary.empty_description: Start by adding total classes and allowed misses.
AttendanceSummary.badge_remaining: {count, plural, one {# miss remaining} other {# misses remaining}}

CreateAssessmentDialog.title: Add Assessment
CreateAssessmentDialog.description: Track an upcoming or completed assessment for this subject.

EditAssessmentDialog.title: Edit Assessment
EditAssessmentDialog.description: Update details, status, dates, and grading values.

DeleteAssessmentDialog.title: Delete Assessment
DeleteAssessmentDialog.prompt_prefix: Are you sure you want to delete

DeleteNoteDialog.title: Delete Note
DeleteNoteDialog.prompt_prefix: Are you sure you want to delete

CreateFlashcardDialog.title: Create Flashcard
CreateFlashcardDialog.field_back_placeholder: e.g. Process plants use to convert light into energy.

EditFlashcardDialog.title: Edit Flashcard
EditFlashcardDialog.field_back_placeholder: e.g. Process plants use to convert light into energy.

DeleteFlashcardDialog.title: Delete Flashcard
DeleteFlashcardDialog.prompt_prefix: Are you sure you want to delete

ResetFlashcardDialog.title: Reset Flashcard
ResetFlashcardDialog.prompt_prefix: Are you sure you want to reset
ResetFlashcardDialog.prompt_suffix: ? All review progress will be lost and the card will be treated as new.

FlashcardPreviewDialog.title: Flashcard Preview
FlashcardPreviewDialog.description: Review the full front and back before editing.

DeleteAccountDialog.title: Delete Account
DeleteAccountDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

DeleteMissDialog.title: Remove Miss
DeleteMissDialog.prompt_prefix: Are you sure you want to remove the miss recorded for

RecordMissDialog.title: Record a Miss
RecordMissDialog.description: Select the date you missed a class for this subject.

NoteDetail.empty: No content yet. Click Edit to add some notes.

UnsavedChangesDialog.title: Discard changes?
UnsavedChangesDialog.description: You have unsaved edits. If you discard now, those changes will be lost.

common.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.forbidden: You are not allowed to do this.

attendance.maxMissesExceeded: Max misses cannot exceed total classes.
attendance.missAlreadyRecorded: A miss is already recorded for this date.

ai.invalidData: Invalid flashcard input for AI generation.
ai.notConfigured: AI flashcard generation is not configured. Add your OpenRouter key and model in your account page.
ai.unavailable: AI flashcard generation is temporarily unavailable.

import.invalidFormat: Invalid Anki import file. Use a .txt export.
import.noCards: No flashcards were found to import.

review.notDue: This flashcard is not due yet.
review.unavailable: Review submission is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.

limits.subjectLimit: System limit reached: you can have up to {max} subjects.
limits.subjectImportLimit: Import failed: you can only have up to {max} subjects.
limits.noteLimit: System limit reached: you can have up to {max} notes per subject.
limits.assessmentLimit: System limit reached: you can have up to {max} assessments per subject.
limits.flashcardLimit: System limit reached: you can have up to {max} flashcards per subject.

auth.emailMaxLength: Email must be at most 254 characters.
auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.passwordMaxLength: Password must be at most 128 characters.
auth.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
auth.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters.

subjects.nameMaxLength: Subject name must be at most 100 characters.
subjects.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 500 characters.

assessments.dueDateInvalid: Due date must be a valid date.
assessments.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most 100 characters.
assessments.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 1000 characters.

notes.titleMaxLength: Note title must be at most 200 characters.
notes.contentMaxLength: Content must be at most 10000 characters.

flashcards.frontMaxLength: Flashcard front must be at most 500 characters.
flashcards.backMaxLength: Flashcard back must be at most 2000 characters.

ankiImport.invalidDate: Import date must be a valid date.

profile.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters.
profile.aiModelMaxLength: Model must be at most 150 characters.
profile.aiApiKeyMaxLength: API key must be at most 500 characters.

search.queryMaxLength: Search query must be at most 200 characters.
